  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow

      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:

  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }

  </style>

    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

    <marker id="arrow" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto"><path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" fill="#67e8f9"/></marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="360" height="220" rx="18" fill="url(#bg)"/>
  <rect x="10" y="10" width="340" height="200" rx="14" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".035" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-opacity=".24"/>
  <text x="180" y="28" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e0f2fe" font-size="12.5" font-weight="700" font-family="Noto Sans Bengali, Arial, sans-serif">চক্রীয় চতুর্ভুজ</text>
  <text x="180" y="44" text-anchor="middle" fill="#93c5fd" font-size="9.5" font-family="Noto Sans Bengali, Arial, sans-serif">∠BAD + ∠BCD</text>
  <g filter="url(#glow)">
    <circle cx="180" cy="115" r="72" fill="none" stroke="#22d3ee" stroke-width="3"/>
    <polygon points="120,74 242,72 263,150 115,162" fill="none" stroke="#a3e635" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="112" y="68" fill="#fff" font-size="11">A</text><text x="250" y="68" fill="#fff" font-size="11">B</text>
    <text x="270" y="154" fill="#fff" font-size="11">C</te

      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }

      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

  </style>

  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }

  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

    }

      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

1️⃣ ADD <style> BLOCK with these animations:
  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

1️⃣ ADD <style> BLOCK with these animations:
  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

    }

      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow

  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

  • Important labels → .anim-fade

  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    @keyframes breathe {

      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }

      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }

  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow

  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow

  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

1️⃣ ADD <style> BLOCK with these animations:
  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    @keyframes breathe {

      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

1️⃣ ADD <style> BLOCK with these animations:
  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    }

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }

      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }

    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }

  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow

  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

1️⃣ ADD <style> BLOCK with these animations:
  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }

    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }

  </style>

  </style>

    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow

1️⃣ ADD <style> BLOCK with these animations:
  <style>
    @keyframes pulse-glow {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes flow-right {
      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

5️⃣ KEEP existing content INTACT — don't remove any labels or shapes.
   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.

      0% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
    }
    @keyframes breathe {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 0.7; }
      50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
    @keyframes fade-in-up {
      0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
      100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .anim-pulse { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-flow { stroke-dasharray: 6 4; animation: flow-right 1s linear infinite; }
    .anim-breathe { animation: breathe 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
    .anim-fade { animation: fade-in-up 0.6s ease-out forwards; opacity: 0; }
  </style>

2️⃣ UPGRADE <defs> with enhanced glow filters:
  <filter id="glow" ...> → replace with feGaussianBlur-based glow
  Add feDropShadow or feGaussianBlur for neon effect

3️⃣ UPGRADE <linearGradient> backgrounds:
  Add rich dark gradients (bgGrad, cardGrad) if not present

4️⃣ ADD animation classes to key elements:
  • Main structural elements → .anim-breathe or .anim-pulse
  • Flowing elements (wires, tubes, rays) → .anim-flow
  • Important labels → .anim-fade

   Only ADD the animation system and upgrade visual quality.
